title: sphaeralcea axillaris
intro: Sphaeralcea axillaris, also known as the yellow globemallow, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mallow family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea axillaris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Sphaeralcea axillaris can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
